findings.message: New pydantic field `widget_timeout_s` is consumed under the `APP_` prefix (env var `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S`) but is not declared in `.env.example`. Operators copying `.env.example` to `.env` get no signal that this knob exists, so staging/prod silently fall back to the hardcoded default of 5.0 with no documented way to tune it — an env-var parity gap across DEV→CI→STAGE→PROD.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` (with a brief comment) to the framework-managed block of `.env.example` so the variable is discoverable and overridable per environment, matching the `settings.py` field name.
